summary: Lighthouse and SEO services testing completed successfully. Backend APIs return dynamic scores (Lighthouse integration working) and comprehensive SEO analysis. Frontend has SEO option in test type dropdown and SEO tab in test result page.

SeoMetricsService provides comprehensive analysis: meta tags, headings, content, technical, structured data, links, mobile

StartTestModal.tsx has SEO option in test type dropdown with description 'Analyze SEO best practices and meta tags'

SEO endpoint returns comprehensive analysis with 9 categories: score, metaTags, headings, content, technical, structuredData, links, mobile, recommendations, issues. Frontend verified: SEO option in dropdown, SEO tab in TestResultPage.
